resources.string:
SkinDiseaseCheck is an AI-based Android app that helps identify common skin conditions.

Just choose an image of the affected skin area from your device\'s gallery.
The app will display the most likely condition along with a confidence percentage.

🔒 Note: This app does not access your camera or collect personal data.
🔑 All image processing is done locally on your device — ensuring full privacy.
💾 Minimal storage usage and no internet connection required after installation.

👤 Developed by: Saswata
💻 Version: 1.0
📱 Works on Android 7.0 (API 24) and above
